pending.description: reMarkable → Obsidian sync skill — pulls handwritten notes, transcribes via vision, saves as markdown. Dispatches to sub-agent for isolated context.

files.description: New skill: sync reMarkable handwritten notes to Obsidian via rmapi → rmc → rsvg-convert → Claude vision pipeline. Runs as sub-agent.

pending.description: New agent: Knox — Knowledge Manager. Owns vault curation, device sync (Remarkable, Plaud), knowledge search, vault health audits, and ingestion workflows. Migrates Plaud from Chief, takes ownership of Remarkable skills.

files.description: New agent: Knox — Knowledge Manager, Vault Curator & Information Architect
New skill: Obsidian vault health audit — orphans, broken links, stale content, missing frontmatter
New skill: deep search across vault — all sources, cross-referenced, with connections
New skill: Plaud transcript ingestion — migrated from chief-plaud, re-owned by Knox
New workflow: unified ingestion pipeline — any capture surface → normalize → tag → link → file
New workflow: weekly knowledge digest — captures, orphans, floating actions, suggested connections

pending.description: New Rigby skill: rigby-release-watch. Checks Claude Code and Cowork release notes on boot for new features relevant to IES. Classifies as Adopt, Evaluate (ask David), or Skip. Added to parallel boot dispatch in chief-morning.

files.description: New skill: check Claude Code + Cowork release notes, classify relevance to IES
Added Release Watch to Rigby's task portfolio
Added Rigby release-watch to parallel boot dispatch (third sub-agent)

pending.description: New Quinn skill: quinn-weekly-review. Assembles complete weekly review prep (rock progress, delegation status, OmniFocus health, calendar analysis, relationship warmth, drift assessment). Runs on demand or via scheduled Friday task.

files.description: New skill: weekly review prep with full data gathering and Quinn's strategic assessment
Added Weekly Review Prep to Quinn's task portfolio
Added weekly review routing signal to Quinn in Agent Routing table

pending.description: Prose narrative morning briefings, autonomous nightly daily review, vault conventions for daily reviews, scheduled task config, and cross-source commitment gap detection in weekly review. Inspired by Gadoci article on AI agent briefing systems.
pending.evolution_name: Narrative Synthesis + Autonomous Review + Commitment Gap Detection
pending.evolution_description: Three capabilities: (1) Morning briefing now delivers a 3-paragraph prose narrative synthesis instead of bullet lists, (2) daily review gains an autonomous mode that runs at 4am, synthesizes from OmniFocus and calendar, and writes a first-person narrative journal entry to Obsidian without user interaction, (3) weekly review gains step 9 for cross-source commitment gap detection across Teams transcripts, chat, email, Plaud, and OmniFocus with pattern tracking across previous reviews.

files.description: New step: autonomous daily review mode. No user interaction. Pulls OmniFocus, calendar, delegations, and rocks. Synthesizes first-person narrative journal entry and writes to Obsidian knowledge system. Runs on scheduled 4am trigger.

New reference: vault conventions for daily review journal entries. Defines target folder (Daily Reviews/), frontmatter format, tag taxonomy, filename convention, note template, writing style, and cross-linking to daily calendar notes.

New config: three scheduled tasks. chief-morning at 6:30am weekdays (prose narrative briefing), chief-review-auto at 4am Mon-Sat (autonomous nightly review to knowledge system), quinn-weekly-review at 8am Sundays (full weekly review prep with commitment gap detection).

Replaced bullet/table briefing format with 3-paragraph prose narrative + calendar table only. Added mandatory synthesis rules: prose reasoning not extraction, connections between data points, calendar table as reference not analysis.

Added auto mode detection via $ARGUMENTS. Updated architecture description to document both modes. Added output routing: auto mode writes to knowledge system only, interactive mode writes review file + knowledge system + delegation updates.

Added step 6: mandatory knowledge system narrative journal write using vault-conventions.md. Updated success metrics to include narrative journal entry requirement. Updated mandatory execution rules to make knowledge system write non-negotiable.

Added step 9: Commitment Gap Detection. Scans Teams transcripts, Teams chat, email, Plaud transcripts in Obsidian, and OmniFocus for commitment language. Classifies gaps as outbound/inbound/mutual. Scans previous weekly reviews for recurring gap patterns. Added Commitment Gaps and Gap Patterns sections to report format. Added two new handoff triggers: inbound commitment gaps going cold to Shep, outbound commitment gaps in client meetings to Chase.

pending.description: Root Audit — Adds root directory hygiene capability to Rigby — surfaces misplaced files, recommends moves or deletions, and executes after confirmation.
pending.evolution_description: Adds root directory hygiene capability to Rigby — surfaces misplaced files, recommends moves or deletions, and executes after confirmation.

files.description: New Rigby skill: audit IES root directory, classify misplaced files as Move/Delete/Unknown, execute after confirmation
Added Root Audit to Rigby's Task Portfolio under system block
New daily-review step 04: root audit — runs after step 03 as final shutdown housekeeping
Updated WORKFLOW COMPLETE to chain to step-04-root-audit instead of halting

pending.description: Scheduled tasks restructured as Cowork-native. Replaces CronCreate session approach with Cowork's built-in Scheduled Tasks panel. Adds Rigby setup skill with copy-paste cards and a boot check in chief-morning that surfaces unconfigured tasks.
pending.evolution_description: Replaces session-scoped CronCreate approach with Cowork's native Scheduled Tasks panel. config/scheduled-tasks.json restructured with configured status flags and copy-paste prompts per task. New rigby-scheduled-setup skill presents unconfigured tasks as copy-paste cards. chief-morning boot check surfaces a one-line notice when tasks need setup.

files.description: Restructured as Cowork-native config: added configured flag, cowork_prompt, schedule_display, keep_awake per task. Removed CronCreate framing.
New Rigby skill: read scheduled-tasks.json, present unconfigured tasks as copy-paste setup cards for Cowork, mark configured after confirmation.
Added scheduled tasks boot check: reads config/scheduled-tasks.json, surfaces a one-line notice at end of briefing if any tasks have configured: false.

pending.description: New master-level skill: send-report. Sends Slack notifications via Jarvis bot (separate identity from David) through Desktop Commander. Any agent or scheduled task can invoke to deliver reports, alerts, and summaries with real push notifications.
pending.evolution_description: Master-level Slack notification skill. Posts via Jarvis bot token through Desktop Commander, bypassing the Slack MCP connector (which posts as David and triggers no notifications). Bot script at systems/slack-bot/post.py. Channels: #jarvis (default), DM to David (urgent).

files.description: New skill: send Slack messages as Jarvis bot via Desktop Commander. Channels, formatting rules, agent usage matrix, error handling.
Python script: posts to Slack API using Jarvis bot token. Args: channel_id, message text.
Reference doc: bot setup, channel IDs, usage examples, formatting guide.
